name: Seattle Dutch Babies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, beat the eggs.
2. Add the flour, 2 tablespoons at a time, beating until smooth after each addition.
3. Incorporate the milk, melted butter, salt, and lemon rind (if used) into the mixture.
4. Pour the batter evenly into two 9-inch pie pans.
5. Bake in a preheated hot oven (400°F) for 10 minutes.
6. Reduce the temperature to 350°F and bake for an additional 5 minutes.
7. Sprinkle with confectioners sugar and serve with lemon wedges.
